message:
chore(demo): fix Clippy lints and improve code style

Addresses rustfmt and Clippy warnings across demo_showcase:

Formatting improvements:
- Use format!("{x:?}") instead of format!("{:?}", x) per Clippy
- Inline format args in panic! and assert! messages

#[must_use] attributes added:
- format_uptime(): Pure function returning formatted string
- format_fraction(): Pure function returning formatted string
- truncate_sha(): Pure function returning string slice

Documentation lint fixes:
- Wrap type names in backticks (FilePicker → `FilePicker`)
- Consistent doc formatting for module-level comments

Self-referential type hints:
- VirtualEntry::dir() children param: &[VirtualEntry] → &[Self]
- VirtualEntry::children() return: Option<&[VirtualEntry]> → Option<&[Self]>

These changes eliminate compiler warnings and improve consistency
with Rust API guidelines for pure functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
